substantive_dimensions.name: Counsel
substantive_dimensions.governing_question: Did the human authority have access to the relevant evidence before the decision?
ceremonial_failure_signs: reviewer sees only a score or recommendation
access occurs only after the decision

substantive_dimensions.name: Judgment
substantive_dimensions.governing_question: Did the human authority evaluate reasons, alternatives, uncertainty, and context?

substantive_dimensions.name: Command
substantive_dimensions.governing_question: Could a named human authority approve, reject, modify, stop, or escalate the action?

substantive_dimensions.name: Correction
substantive_dimensions.governing_question: Could the decision be contested, interrupted, reversed, or appealed in practice?
ceremonial_failure_signs: appeal channel with no substantive reversals

substantive_dimensions.name: Repair
substantive_dimensions.governing_question: Did a named actor own remediation after substantiated harm?
ceremonial_failure_signs: system corrected while affected persons remain unrepaired

substantive_dimensions.name: Reform
substantive_dimensions.governing_question: Did a named authority have power to change the decision architecture itself?

cross_cutting_dimension.name: Telemetry Integrity
cross_cutting_dimension.governing_question: Can the evidence used to assess the six substantive dimensions be trusted as an audit record?
